hero.title: Contact Us
hero.description: Tell us your project needs and we will come back with a practical quote - spec, MOQ, lead time, customization options, and next steps.
hero.note: Response target: within 24 hours on business days.

rfq.title: Request a Quote (RFQ)
rfq.note: Please include the following for a faster response:
items: Target market (EU/US/UK/...) and required labels or marks
Customization scope (logo, packaging, structure, scan engine / interface)

items.title: Email
items.note: Response target: within 24 hours on business days.

items.title: Factory Address
items.value: No. 14, Shetouling 1st Road, Sanlian Village, Lihu Street, Zengcheng District, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China

samples.title: Get Samples
samples.description: Prefer to validate first? We support stock samples and branded samples depending on your timeline.
